subcodes.first_line: Verily, the Tree maketh mention of one of its leaves and a handmaiden from among His handmaidens, and I am, verily, the All-Compassionate, the Most Bountiful. Be thou not grieved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان السدره تذکر الورقه من اوراقها و امه من امائها و انا المشفق الکریم لاتحزنی
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement
